implemented: 5 tool endpoints: tessera-analyze, tessera-trust, tessera-memory, tessera-health, tessera-status
JSON request/response protocol matching AGNT plugin spec
finding: The AGNT Bridge provides a clean HTTP interface for Tessera's 5 core tools. All handlers return version, claim_boundary, and structured responses. The bridge can run as a standalone HTTP server on port 8765, receiving POST /tools/:tool-name requests from AGNT.
decision: Promote AGNT Bridge. Next: run integration test against AGNT plugin system, then deploy.
non_claim_lock: The AGNT Bridge is a local HTTP server for development. Production deployment requires AGNT plugin registration, security review, and independent host validation.
